_README: This is the ONLY file you edit. See README.md. Every change is timestamped in the public git commit history.

note.borrower: Unilateral, LLC (a Wyoming limited liability company)

prepaidInterest.note: Odd-days interest accrued from closing to the first payment date. Collected from the borrower at closing and disbursed to the lender. Taxable interest income to the lender in the year received.

paymentRail.method: Recurring ACH push, originated by the borrower through Mercury
paymentRail.schedule: $450.00 auto-drafted on or around the 1st, for 60 months (Aug 2026 - Jul 2031)
paymentRail.timingNote: The draft may land a day or two after the 1st when it falls on a weekend or bank holiday. That is expected and is not treated as a late payment - the note allows a 10-day grace period before any late fee.
paymentRail.lenderDetailsHeldBy: Mercury (entered by the lender directly via Mercury's payee portal; no account numbers are stored in this repository)
